deploy_applicable_reason: plotwright is a PyQt6 cross-platform desktop application (CLI / library / desktop-app class per Nexus v1.0.53 /land-vs-/deploy split). No production deploy surface, no production URL, no health check endpoint. The merge-only path is /land, not /land-and-deploy.
setup_deploy_required_reason: Repo class does not have a deploy surface. /setup-deploy is not applicable.
post_ship_route_rationale: Per Nexus v1.0.53 documentation: '/land is split from /land-and-deploy so PR landing and deployment become separate flows.' This repo's class (desktop app) explicitly fits the /land-only path: '/land — Use when a shipped PR should be merged without assuming deployment, or when the project is a CLI, library, desktop app, docs-only change, or otherwise has no production deploy surface.'
future_release_considerations: When v1 ships externally, package the desktop app via the existing pyproject.toml console_scripts (`plotwright = novelwriter:main`).
Cross-platform packaging (Linux .deb, Windows .msi, macOS .dmg) deferred to S6 hardening per execution-readiness-packet.md.
No deploy contract needed for the GPL-3 fork; users install via `pip install plotwright` once published (PyPI placeholder TBD; sprint-contract risk register flags PyPI name conflict pre-check).
